title: cajanus sericeus
intro: Cajanus sericeus, also known as the silver cluster bean or hairy galega, is a plant species native to tropical Asia. It is a legume that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Cajanus sericeus is often used in the form of powder, tea, or oil, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
